title: A Big Budget Plan for the Military
summary: President Trump wants to spend a lot more money on the military in 2027. He asked for $1.5 trillion for defense, which is 44% higher than before. This is the biggest request in many years. At the same time, he plans to spend less on other programs like schools and roads by 10%. A man named Russell Vought, who works on the budget, talked to Congress about this plan. He said the president wants to keep America safe. The budget shows what the president thinks is important, but Congress gets to decide if they will use it. They often change the budget. You can watch the talk live online.

keywords.explanation: a plan for how the government will spend money
the military and things that keep the country safe
the group of people in Washington who make laws and decide on spending
to speak and answer questions in a formal meeting
the most important things that someone wants to do

questions.question: How much money does President Trump want for defense in 2027?
What is the percentage increase for defense spending?
Who talked to Congress about the budget plan?
What does the budget plan reduce spending on?
Does the president's budget automatically become law?
Where can you watch the talk about the budget?

background_read: The United States government makes a budget every year to plan how to spend money on things like the military, schools, and healthcare. The president suggests a budget, but Congress, which is made up of elected officials, has to approve it. Sometimes they agree, and sometimes they change it. This article is about a big budget plan for 2027 that focuses on spending more on defense to keep the country safe.
Article_Structure: WHO: President Trump and Budget Director Russell Vought
WHAT: A plan to increase defense spending to $1.5 trillion and reduce other spending by 10%
WHERE: Washington D.C., in a House Budget Committee hearing
WHY: To show the president's priorities for keeping America safe and to guide Congress in making spending decisions

perspectives.description: Some people think spending more on defense is important to protect the country from dangers.
